title: viola hirta subsp. foudrasii
intro: Viola hirta subsp. foudrasii, also known as the hairy violet, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the violet family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Viola hirta subsp. foudrasii include its potential to alleviate digestive problems, reduce anxiety and stress, and even help with wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
